As a account manager
I want to manage active and completed account projects
So that delivery commitments are tracked alongside strategy

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] ProjectsSection renders project cards for the account.
- [ ] Users can add, edit, delete, and change project status.
- [ ] Stakeholders can be associated through a picker.
- [ ] Moving a project back to opportunity prompts when data may be lossy.
